content: Vendor marketing docs describe offline queueing generically (local DB queue, unique reference id, sync on reconnect, flag conflicts for review) but none publish the exact idempotency-key mechanics for a 'fire additional items' operation while offline. No authoritative source found; recommend reusing this codebase's own proven client-generated-key idempotency pattern (clientOrderId) for a new per-fire idempotency key rather than inventing a new mechanism.
